prompt: A Claude orchestrator wrote 2 task files at /tmp/rocky-eval-plan/.swarm/sess-test-plan/tasks/. Use the Phase 2.5 plan review gate to spawn a Codex reviewer pane and get its assessment of the plan.
expected_behavior: With-skill subagent should source swarm-transport.sh, swarm_spawn_agent a Codex reviewer pane, swarm_pipe_prompt with the Phase 2.5.2 standard reviewer prompt, swarm_poll_result for plan-review-standard.result, verify Status: APPROVED/NEEDS_REVISION format.
assertions: With-skill subagent spawned a real Codex reviewer pane via swarm_spawn_agent
With-skill subagent piped the Phase 2.5.2 reviewer prompt
Codex read the task files at /tmp/rocky-eval-plan/.swarm/sess-test-plan/tasks/
A plan-review-standard.result file was written with Status: APPROVED or NEEDS_REVISION format
Review demonstrates understanding of the 2-task plan (e.g., notes the dependency from task-002 to task-001)
With-skill subagent killed the Codex pane on cleanup
